response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video content, identifying it as a segment from the 'Morning Mio' VTuber stream. 2. Observed that the content primarily consists of the VTuber, Mio Ookami, speaking directly to her audience and interacting with chat comments. 3. Monitored for any vocal music (singing) and determined there is no vocal music present in the video, only instrumental background music during transitions. 4. Defined scene boundaries based on visual transitions (initial talk, news transition, news segment). 5. Confirmed all musical elements detected are instrumental, thus 'contains_vocal_music' is set to false for all scenes.
response.global_summary: Mio Ookami hosts a segment of 'Morning Mio', discussing the concept of 'May sickness' and scheduling, followed by an transition to a news segment.

scenes.description: The VTuber Mio Ookami speaks to the camera, interacting with her audience about 'May sickness' and daily routines. No vocal music is present.
The video transitions to the 'Morning Mio News' screen with instrumental background music.
The news segment begins, specifically regarding the 'secret society holoX' live event. No vocal music is present.
